title: The Black Bag
writer: George Hively, Bernard H. Hyman, Louis Joseph Vance

plot: Billy Kirkwood, a young businessman, travels to New York City for a vacation. There he comes to the rescue of pretty young Dorothy Calender, escorting her to a taxi because she was being followed by some sinister-looking men. It t...
